name: polariton-sim
description: An open-source, in-browser cavity-QED instrument (Rust→WASM): quantum core validated against QuTiP 5.3 / NumPy goldens; transfer-matrix optics & Holstein–Tavis–Cummings vibronics against closed-form analytic benchmarks.
//test: `npm test` runs only the analytic-engine vitest suite (optics/HTC/Marcus closed-form checks). The QuTiP 5.3 / NumPy golden validation of the Rust quantum core runs via `npm run test:quantum` (cargo) — both are gated in CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml).
